name: "I can't believe I signed up for this..." // Mega Anthro Delphox
description:
(Of course they brought ME here...)
"...Abrakazam.. or whatever they say. Can I go home now?"

Y'know, the more I think about it, there would be a good chance another Pokémon that has an available Mega Evolution accidentally permanently Mega Evolved.
...Probably made that shit expensive..

...ANYWAY--enjoy the Mega Delphox. Goodnight everybody!
